name: Ternary Cloud Cost Anomaly
description: Structure documentation for a cloud cost anomaly detected by Ternary's ML-powered algorithms.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the anomaly

fields.name: cloud_provider
fields.description: Cloud provider where anomaly was detected

fields.name: service
fields.description: Cloud service that generated the anomalous costs (e.g., BigQuery, EC2, Azure Functions)

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Severity level based on cost delta magnitude

fields.name: expected_cost
fields.description: Baseline cost expected based on ML historical analysis (USD)

fields.name: actual_cost
fields.description: Actual observed cost that triggered anomaly detection (USD)

fields.name: detected_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when anomaly was first detected

fields.name: acknowledged_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when anomaly was acknowledged by a team member

fields.name: affected_resources
fields.description: List of cloud resource IDs contributing to the anomaly
